description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a minimalist design, featuring a smooth, dark brown tabletop and slender, straight legs. The desk includes a single, slim drawer on the right side, seamlessly integrated into the front panel for storage. The legs are positioned at the corners and appear to be made of wood with a slightly lighter finish than the top, providing a subtle contrast. The overall construction is sleek and modern, with clean lines and no visible hardware or ornamentation. The desk's compact size makes it suitable for small spaces, and its sturdy build suggests it can support typical office or study items. The finish is even and polished, giving the desk a refined and professional appearance.
description: A modern, rectangular wooden desk with a dark brown top, slender legs, and a single integrated drawer on the right side. The design is sleek, minimalist, and well-suited for compact workspaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the desk, the dark brown tabletop, and the integrated right-side drawer.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the desk and the straight, slender legs.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the plain back panel and the continuous tabletop without visible drawers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and the clean, uninterrupted lines of the desk.
attribute_orientation: The side with the integrated drawer and open leg space is intended to face the user, serving as the front of the desk, while the plain panel is the back.
attribute_usage_context: writing desk or compact computer workstation
